name: cardinal-search
title: Cardinal Search
description: Send Raycast input or selected text directly to Cardinal.
author: xiaoliangkk

commands.name: search-cardinal
commands.title: Search Cardinal
commands.description: Send a query from Raycast to Cardinal.

commands.name: send-selection
commands.title: Send Selection to Cardinal
commands.description: Send the currently selected text to Cardinal.

preferences.name: cardinalAppName
preferences.title: Application Name
preferences.description: The process/application name used by macOS.

preferences.name: cardinalAppPath
preferences.title: Application Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to Cardinal.app. Leave empty to open by app name.
